name: Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, cooked and peeled, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add corn; continue cooking until corn is slightly soft.
4. Pour in Jack Daniels whiskey and ignite carefully.
5. Tilt the pot so the flame touches all the corn.
6. When the flame goes out, stir in flour.
7. Slowly stir in the stock, cream, salt, and pepper.
8. Heat until thickened.
9. Add potato cubes.
10. Cook through; serve hot.
